Some sad news to report that Emmet Mullins's 2022
item.description:
Sporting Life Racing @SportingLife · 5min Rest in peace, Noble Yeats
Some sad news to report that Emmet Mullins's 2022 Grand National winner has passed away at the age of 11, after suffering from colic. Aintree Racecourse 6 235
